task_completion.description: Agent logged into the POS system using the manager PIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Login screen showing '1111' entered in the PIN pad, or successful access to the Back Office/Admin dashboard indicating successful manager login.

task_completion.description: Agent accessed the administrative area for managing users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Users', 'Employees', or 'Back Office' management window of the Floreant POS system is open.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the new employee's first and last name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New User' or 'Add User' form showing 'Maria' in the First Name field and 'Santos' in the Last Name field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the Secret Key for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Secret Key or PIN field in the user form contains '2345' (or 4 masked bullet characters if obscured during entry).

task_completion.description: Agent selected the correct user type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The User Type or Role dropdown/selection in the user form is explicitly set to 'CASHIER'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the new user record successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user list or employee directory updates to display the newly created record for 'Maria Santos' (or 'Maria', 'Santos') with the type 'CASHIER'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the POS system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction within the Floreant POS application windows, rather than terminal commands, SQL queries, or database manipulation scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry happens inside the actual Floreant POS application forms, not in Notepad, gedit, or any other text editor.

integrity.description: The application being used is genuinely Floreant POS.
integrity.visual_evidence: Window titles, logos, and UI elements match the standard Java-based Floreant POS system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The manager PIN 1111 is verified as the correct default admin PIN to access the Floreant POS system. The user type 'CASHIER' is a verified valid role in the system.
